item.title: The 'off-price' boom: Retail giant announces $2.5B buyback as discount shopping surges
item.description: While department stores struggle, off-price retailers like TJ Maxx, Marshalls and HomeGoods are booming as Americans shop selectively on their own aff...

item.title: Spirit Airlines reaches deal to exit bankruptcy proceedings by early summer
item.description: Spirit Airlines announced an agreement with lenders to emerge from bankruptcy this year as a leaner airline focused on high-demand routes and premium ...

item.title: Lamborghini scraps first EV launch, calls development 'expensive hobby'
item.description: Lamborghini canceled plans for an upcoming electric vehicle launch due to a lack of consumer demand and will replace it with a plug-in hybrid instead,...

item.title: Novo Nordisk to slash list prices of Ozempic, Wegovy by up to 50%
item.description: Novo Nordisk announced up to 50% price cuts for Ozempic and Wegovy diabetes and weight-loss drugs starting January 2027, lowering costs to $675 per do...

item.title: Public Storage relocates headquarters from California to Texas
item.description: Public Storage will relocate its headquarters to Texas alongside a CEO change and a broader plan aimed at boosting margins, earnings and shareholder r...
